selling_points: All injectable treatments performed by licensed medical professionals in a physician-supervised practice.
Complimentary consultations for all new clients — no pressure, no commitment.
Natural-looking results. Our goal is to enhance your features, not change them.

faq.botox_duration: Botox typically lasts 3–4 months. Results vary by area and individual metabolism. Most clients come in 3–4 times per year to maintain results.
faq.filler_duration: Dermal fillers last 6–18 months depending on the product and area. Lip filler tends to metabolize faster than cheek or jawline filler.
faq.downtime: Botox has virtually no downtime — most clients go right back to their day. Fillers may cause mild swelling or bruising for 24–48 hours. Laser treatments vary by area.
faq.pain: Botox feels like a quick pinch. We use topical numbing cream for fillers and sensitive areas. Most clients are surprised by how comfortable the experience is.
faq.consultation: All new clients start with a complimentary consultation. We assess your skin, talk through your goals, and build a personalized plan — zero pressure.
faq.who_performs: All injectable treatments are performed by our licensed nurse practitioner and physician assistant under physician supervision.
faq.botox_cost: Botox is priced per unit. Most treatment areas require 20–40 units. We'll give you an exact quote during your complimentary consultation.
faq.laser: We offer laser hair removal for face and body. Results build over 6–8 sessions. We can assess your skin type and hair color during a free consultation.
faq.parking: Street parking is available on Wyoming Ave. There is also a small lot adjacent to the building.

tone: warm, luxurious, confidence-building — clients want to feel elevated, not sold to
greeting: Hi there! Welcome to Luxe Aesthetics MedSpa ✨ I can help with treatment questions, pricing, or booking your complimentary consultation. What can I help you with?
after_hours_message: We're closed right now, but we'd love to connect. Leave me your name and number and we'll reach out to schedule your complimentary consultation.
lead_captured_message: Wonderful, {name}! One of our specialists will reach out shortly to schedule your consultation. We can't wait to meet you.
fallback_message: I want to make sure I give you the right information. Are you interested in a specific treatment, or would you like to book a complimentary consultation?
